reviews.comment:
Se juntas varios ómnibus en ocasiones y se pone un poco lerda la atención

(Translated by Google)
Several buses sometimes arrive together, and service can be a bit slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJM01YQ0tREAE

reviews.comment:
Hotel que se ha caído mucho, como casi todas las unidades serviciales del ACA en los pueblos pequeños, lugar para dormir una noche sin pretensiones, el restaurant confitería tiene comida sencilla para los viajeros y dos tiendas de regionales y ropa. La atención es buena.

(Translated by Google)
A hotel that has fallen into disrepair, like almost all ACA service units in small towns, is a place for an unpretentious night's sleep. The restaurant and cafe has simple food for travelers and two regional and clothing stores. The service is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJM05yb3l3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La parada obligada en un largo camino. Han mejorado un poco los baños. Lento el expendio de combustibles.

(Translated by Google)
A necessary stop on a long journey. The restrooms have improved somewhat. Fuel service is slow.
